creator: bayartb@edgard.fdn.fr
text:
"Mon ami Tim Vanderhoek m'a dit:"

> 
> On Fri, May 21, 1999 at 06:06:47PM +0200, Remy Card wrote:
> > 
> > >Description:
> > 
> > 	bsd.port.subdir.mk does not define the `makesum' target.  So one cannot
> > recursively create checksums in a port hierarchy.
> 
> Out of curiousity, why would one want to recursively create checksums
> in a port hierarchy?
> 

When one automatically generates 450 ports :-)
